NODES.body: A READ/monitor surface fed by TWO separate Mac-cron pipelines, plus its OWN deploy path — not a hub every monitored component wires into directly. DATA refresh: generate-status.js (5-min, main ops/agents/spine/cost/freshness bundle) + financial_agent's 3-cron pipeline (edgar-scraper.js 6:30am, financial-analyst.js Sun 20:10, run_builder.sh 5:05am) feeding the FINANCIAL INTEL tab (SEC EDGAR data, 78 companies) — genuinely distinct data streams, both Mac-generated. CODE/RESOURCES deploy: sasmaster-status is its OWN git repo/Vercel project (github.com/sas411/sasmaster-status), pushed directly by Shiv — separate from the SaSMaster repo's GHA/Railway pipeline entirely. Plus live Railway /api/command calls for interactive actions (canvas bless, jarvis run). DEGRADED: root URL serves a retirement stub; live board is warroom-v5. RULED 2026-07-21: warroom-v5 IS production mission control — WARROOM-REWRITE-001's rebuild premise is CLOSED/superseded, no rebuild planned.
NODES.cnt: 18 runtime fetches · {{count:resources_json_count}} resources (census {{asof:resources_json_count}}, resources.json) · 2 data pipelines · own deploy repo

NODES.body: The product face. PARKED. Canon dispute CLOSED 2026-07-17 (PORTAL-CANON-001) — portal-v8 is canonical, recorded in L3 platform_state.portal_canonical; blue-green rebuild Wave 3. 2026-07-18 clarification (same L3 row): portal-v8 is a placeholder canonical, not final — only warroom-v5.html is confirmed as the actual production surface in active use; other Vercel sites including portal-v8 remain prototype-status.

NODES.body: Natural-language analytics. Every read via plan_executor grammars — never raw SQL; safe-refusal on unknowns. Runs as its own distinct Railway service (ask_server.Dockerfile, health-probed; not folded into command-api). Reads MotherDuck directly on a read-only PAT — ASK_MOTHERDUCK_TOKEN (ask_server.py:78-88), bypassing the Mac-mediated MD path used elsewhere.

NODES.body: The thinking surface. Human-driven sessions where doctrine gets authored before mechanics exist; certification-of-record home for the remediation program.
NODES.cnt: human-only · zero scheduled jobs

NODES.body: The Will. Decomposes intent and dispatches the fleet through the task bus. K4 contract: READ-everything (L3 scoped role, S3, status, logs) + sanctioned actions (dispatch-to-queue, verify, page) + propose_gate — and NOTHING else. Deliberately NO skills loading (that's the executors' routing-gate mechanism) and NO MCP consumption; CM6 later makes it an MCP server for claude.ai surfaces. SHADOW until 50 honest reviews (KERNEL-GRAD-001, Wave 3).
NODES.cnt: review quota 9/50 · $0.011/turn · dispatch_verify live in shadow (tools.ts)

NODES.body: The OS loops — the platform's "was this efficient" analysis. Reflect is live as Dreams. Distill/report exist as CODE (advisor_nightly.py, PLATFORM-ADVISOR-001 T3) that reads the event hub nightly and drafts: a FEEDBACK digest (skills fired vs idle, would_have_refused hot spots, dead gates), lesson drafts, registry proposals — all human-blessed, never auto-deposited. Currently BLOCKED (exits 0 no-op pending R-1) and not yet cron-scheduled. Self-Learning scored 5.0 — zero promotions since 04-23.
NODES.cnt: 1 of 4 loops live · distill/report built-not-running (advisor_nightly.py)

NODES.body: The nervous system — partially live, not fully decorative. Currently paging red — s3-queue depth=1, oldest_pending=31min (as of 2026-07-21 12:24, still live at last check). Freshness Sentinel side is thin (0 manifests, Wave 1 arms it via PULSE-EMIT-001) — how Nielsen went a month stale unseen. BUT cost/usage alerting is ALREADY LIVE: search_guard.py (Mac cron) reads logs/cost-log.jsonl per-agent spend, enforces budget caps, writes blocked-flags + posts real Slack alerts at 80%/100%. DEADMAN-001 has GRADUATED past target: deployed to Railway 2026-07-21, already ran a live cycle and caught/triaged 2 real issues (a stale invariant-check heartbeat and a never-seen media-intel-agent). Dedicated APM (Sentry-class) was evaluated and DELIBERATELY DEFERRED (PLUGIN-ADOPT-001, "post kernel-shadow") — not an oversight.

NODES.body: The Conscience — and the event hub's only writer. Refuses ungoverned writes: owner-skill routing gate (HMAC ledger), doctrine conformance, token gate, enforce gates. This IS the platform's event hub.

NODES.body: Elastic burst for harvest fleets only — spun on demand, never standing compute. Note: one stopped instance has reportedly persisted ~24 days since 06-28. Whether this contradicts "never standing" depends on what that claim means — a stopped (non-running, non-billed) instance is a hygiene item (should be terminated) rather than an architecture violation if the claim is about active compute-hours, but a real violation if it's about resource existence. Semantics not yet clarified with Shiv — flagged, not resolved.
NODES.cnt: on-demand · no scheduled residency (stopped-instance hygiene item flagged, pending clarification)
